// Decisions.jsx import React, { useMemo, useState } from "react"; /* Decisions.jsx - Single-file React component for the "Replacement Decisions" page - Renders ONLY page content (AdminLayout provides header/sidebar/footer) - Tailwind CSS for styling - Dummy JSON data included below (replace with ML Decision / Financial APIs in production) Integration notes (placeholders): - Backend ML API should provide replacement requests with fields: { id, // system id or request id systemId, owner, // owner / department requestedBy, // user who requested replacement aiVerdict, // 'approve' | 'reject' (ML final recommendation) rootCause, // 'Hardware' | 'Software' | 'Security' confidence, // number 0-100 estimatedCost, // number (currency) riskIfDelayed, // 'Low' | 'Medium' | 'High' status, // 'pending' | 'approved' | 'rejected' | 'deferred' timestamps: { // audit timestamps requestedAt, aiVerdictAt, reviewedAt, finalDecisionAt }, systemSnapshot: { // small summary returned by system API / ML pipeline ageYears, warrantyUntil, healthTrend // array of points or simple summary text }, evidence: { hardware: [...], software: [...], security: [...] }, financial: { downtimeCostPerHour, repairEstimate, replaceEstimate }, timeline: [ { ts, actor, action, note } ] } - View Decision -> opens drawer with details (client-side only) - Approve / Reject / Defer / Request More Evidence -> call review APIs (placeholders) - Sorting / Filtering -> ideally performed server-side via query params; here we do client-side for demo */ const DUMMY_REQUESTS = [ { id: "REQ-2026-001", systemId: "SYS-8472", owner: "Manufacturing / Line B", requestedBy: "tech.alex", aiVerdict: "approve", rootCause: "Hardware", confidence: 94, estimatedCost: 4200, riskIfDelayed: "High", status: "pending", timestamps: { requestedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 48 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), // 48h ago aiVerdictAt: new Date(Date.now() - 36 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), reviewedAt: null, finalDecisionAt: null, }, systemSnapshot: { ageYears: 4, warrantyUntil: new Date(Date.now() + 60 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), healthTrend: [ { label: "30d", value: 78 }, { label: "14d", value: 62 }, { label: "7d", value: 55 }, { label: "1d", value: 42 }, ], }, evidence: { hardware: [ "SMART warnings: reallocated sectors rising", "I/O latencies correlated with backup windows", ], software: ["Backup job overlapping causing higher I/O"], security: ["No persistent malicious indicators"], }, financial: { downtimeCostPerHour: 1200, repairEstimate: 1800, replaceEstimate: 4200, }, timeline: [ { ts: new Date(Date.now() - 48 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), actor: "tech.alex", action: "Requested replacement", note: "Intermittent failures observed" }, { ts: new Date(Date.now() - 36 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), actor: "ML Engine", action: "AI verdict", note: "Recommend APPROVE (94% confidence)" }, ], }, { id: "REQ-2026-002", systemId: "SYS-9031", owner: "Data Center / Rack 7", requestedBy: "ops.maya", aiVerdict: "reject", rootCause: "Software", confidence: 78, estimatedCost: 1600, riskIfDelayed: "Medium", status: "pending", timestamps: { requestedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 10 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), aiVerdictAt: new Date(Date.now() - 9 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), reviewedAt: null, finalDecisionAt: null, }, systemSnapshot: { ageYears: 2, warrantyUntil: null, healthTrend: [ { label: "30d", value: 88 }, { label: "7d", value: 84 }, { label: "1d", value: 80 }, ], }, evidence: { hardware: ["No hardware anomalies"], software: ["Misconfigured service causing retries", "Patch pending"], security: ["No issues"], }, financial: { downtimeCostPerHour: 400, repairEstimate: 400, replaceEstimate: 1600, }, timeline: [ { ts: new Date(Date.now() - 10 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), actor: "ops.maya", action: "Requested replacement", note: "App-level restarts observed" }, { ts: new Date(Date.now() - 9 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), actor: "ML Engine", action: "AI verdict", note: "Recommend REJECT (78% confidence)" }, ], }, { id: "REQ-2026-003", systemId: "SYS-7720", owner: "R&D / Lab", requestedBy: "eng.sam", aiVerdict: "approve", rootCause: "Hardware", confidence: 85, estimatedCost: 1200, riskIfDelayed: "Low", status: "approved", timestamps: { requestedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 6 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), aiVerdictAt: new Date(Date.now() - 5.5 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), reviewedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 4 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), finalDecisionAt: new Date(Date.now() - 3.5 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), }, systemSnapshot: { ageYears: 5, warrantyUntil: null, healthTrend: [ { label: "90d", value: 85 }, { label: "30d", value: 70 }, { label: "7d", value: 48 }, ], }, evidence: { hardware: ["Repeated ECC corrections on memory", "SMART critical thresholds exceeded"], software: ["N/A"], security: ["N/A"], }, financial: { downtimeCostPerHour: 200, repairEstimate: 200, replaceEstimate: 1200, }, timeline: [ { ts: new Date(Date.now() - 6 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), actor: "eng.sam", action: "Requested replacement", note: "Frequent crashes during tests" }, { ts: new Date(Date.now() - 5.5 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), actor: "ML Engine", action: "AI verdict", note: "Recommend APPROVE (85% confidence)" }, { ts: new Date(Date.now() - 4 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), actor: "lead.jordan", action: "Approved replacement", note: "Order placed" }, ], }, ]; // ---------- Utilities ---------- function currency(v) { return v.toLocaleString(undefined, { style: "currency", currency: "USD", maximumFractionDigits: 0 }); } function relativeTime(iso) { const d = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(iso).getTime()) / 1000); if (d < 60) return ${d}s ago; if (d < 3600) return ${Math.floor(d / 60)}m ago; if (d < 86400) return ${Math.floor(d / 3600)}h ago; return ${Math.floor(d / 86400)}d ago; } function statusBadgeClass(status) { switch (status) { case "pending": return "bg-yellow-50 text-yellow-800"; case "approved": return "bg-green-50 text-green-800"; case "rejected": return "bg-red-50 text-red-800"; case "deferred": return "bg-slate-50 text-slate-800"; default: return "bg-gray-100 text-gray-800"; } } function riskBadgeClass(risk) { if (risk === "High") return "bg-red-50 text-red-700"; if (risk === "Medium") return "bg-yellow-50 text-yellow-800"; return "bg-green-50 text-green-700"; } // ---------- Component ---------- export default function Decisions() { const [requests, setRequests] = useState(DUMMY_REQUESTS); const [query, setQuery] = useState(""); const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState("All"); const [rootCauseFilter, setRootCauseFilter] = useState("All"); const [sortKey, setSortKey] = useState("timestamps.requestedAt"); // default sort const [sortDir, setSortDir] = useState("desc"); // Drawer state const [drawerOpen, setDrawerOpen] = useState(false); const [selected, setSelected] = useState(null); // Action reason input within drawer const [actionMode, setActionMode] = useState(null); // 'approve' | 'reject' | 'defer' | 'evidence' const [actionReason, setActionReason] = useState(""); // Search + filters const visible = useMemo(() => { const q = query.trim().toLowerCase(); const filtered = requests.filter((r) => { if (statusFilter !== "All" && r.status !== statusFilter.toLowerCase()) return false; if (rootCauseFilter !== "All" && r.rootCause !== rootCauseFilter) return false; if (!q) return true; return ( r.id.toLowerCase().includes(q) || r.systemId.toLowerCase().includes(q) || r.owner.toLowerCase().includes(q) || r.requestedBy.toLowerCase().includes(q) ); }); // basic sorting const sorted = [...filtered].sort((a, b) => { const get = (obj, path) => path.split(".").reduce((s, k) => (s ? s[k] : undefined), obj); const va = get(a, sortKey); const vb = get(b, sortKey); if (va == null && vb == null) return 0; if (va == null) return sortDir === "asc" ? -1 : 1; if (vb == null) return sortDir === "asc" ? 1 : -1; if (typeof va === "number" && typeof vb === "number") return sortDir === "asc" ? va - vb : vb - va; return sortDir === "asc" ? String(va).localeCompare(String(vb)) : String(vb).localeCompare(String(va)); }); return sorted; }, [requests, query, statusFilter, rootCauseFilter, sortKey, sortDir]); // KPI badges const kpis = useMemo(() => { const pending = requests.filter((r) => r.status === "pending").length; const approvedToday = requests.filter((r) => { if (!r.timestamps.finalDecisionAt) return false; const d = new Date(r.timestamps.finalDecisionAt); const now = new Date(); return d.toDateString() === now.toDateString() && r.status === "approved"; }).length; const costAtRisk = requests .filter((r) => r.status === "pending") .reduce((s, r) => s + (r.estimatedCost || 0), 0); return { pending, approvedToday, costAtRisk }; }, [requests]); // Open drawer for item const openDrawer = (req) => { setSelected(req); setActionMode(null); setActionReason(""); setDrawerOpen(true); }; // Close drawer const closeDrawer = () => { setDrawerOpen(false); setSelected(null); setActionMode(null); setActionReason(""); }; // Perform action (placeholder - should call backend review API) const performAction = (mode) => { if (!selected) return; if (!actionReason || actionReason.trim().length < 5) { alert("Please provide a reason (min 5 characters) for this action."); return; } // Placeholder: update local state to simulate review action setRequests((prev) => prev.map((r) => r.id === selected.id ? { ...r, status: mode === "approve" ? "approved" : mode === "reject" ? "rejected" : mode === "defer" ? "deferred" : r.status, timestamps: { ...r.timestamps, reviewedAt: new Date().toISOString(), finalDecisionAt: mode === "approve" || mode === "reject" ? new Date().toISOString() : r.timestamps.finalDecisionAt, }, timeline: [ ...r.timeline, { ts: new Date().toISOString(), actor: "reviewer.current", action: mode === "approve" ? "Approved" : mode === "reject" ? "Rejected" : mode === "defer" ? "Deferred" : "Requested more evidence", note: actionReason }, ], } : r ) ); // Log to console as a placeholder for backend call console.log(Action performed: ${mode} on ${selected.id} with reason: , actionReason); // Close drawer after action closeDrawer(); }; // Sorting helper const toggleSort = (key) => { if (sortKey === key) { setSortDir((d) => (d === "asc" ? "desc" : "asc")); } else { setSortKey(key); setSortDir("desc"); } }; // Executive insights derived from dummy data (client-side) const insights = useMemo(() => { const moneySaved = requests.filter((r) => r.status === "rejected").reduce((s, r) => s + (r.estimatedCost || 0), 0); const falseClaims = requests.filter((r) => r.status === "rejected" && r.aiVerdict === "approve").length; const agingTrend = Math.round(requests.reduce((s, r) => s + (r.systemSnapshot?.ageYears || 0), 0) / requests.length); return { moneySaved, falseClaims, agingTrend }; }, [requests]); return (
{/* Header */}

Replacement Decisions

// Decisions.jsx import React, { useMemo, useState } from "react"; /* Decisions.jsx - Single-file React component for the "Replacement Decisions" page - Renders ONLY page content (AdminLayout provides header/sidebar/footer) - Tailwind CSS for styling - Dummy JSON data included below (replace with ML Decision / Financial APIs in production) Integration notes (placeholders): - Backend ML API should provide replacement requests with fields: { id, // system id or request id systemId, owner, // owner / department requestedBy, // user who requested replacement aiVerdict, // 'approve' | 'reject' (ML final recommendation) rootCause, // 'Hardware' | 'Software' | 'Security' confidence, // number 0-100 estimatedCost, // number (currency) riskIfDelayed, // 'Low' | 'Medium' | 'High' status, // 'pending' | 'approved' | 'rejected' | 'deferred' timestamps: { // audit timestamps requestedAt, aiVerdictAt, reviewedAt, finalDecisionAt }, systemSnapshot: { // small summary returned by system API / ML pipeline ageYears, warrantyUntil, healthTrend // array of points or simple summary text }, evidence: { hardware: [...], software: [...], security: [...] }, financial: { downtimeCostPerHour, repairEstimate, replaceEstimate }, timeline: [ { ts, actor, action, note } ] } - View Decision -> opens drawer with details (client-side only) - Approve / Reject / Defer / Request More Evidence -> call review APIs (placeholders) - Sorting / Filtering -> ideally performed server-side via query params; here we do client-side for demo */ const DUMMY_REQUESTS = [ { id: "REQ-2026-001", systemId: "SYS-8472", owner: "Manufacturing / Line B", requestedBy: "tech.alex", aiVerdict: "approve", rootCause: "Hardware", confidence: 94, estimatedCost: 4200, riskIfDelayed: "High", status: "pending", timestamps: { requestedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 48 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), // 48h ago aiVerdictAt: new Date(Date.now() - 36 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), reviewedAt: null, finalDecisionAt: null, }, systemSnapshot: { ageYears: 4, warrantyUntil: new Date(Date.now() + 60 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), healthTrend: [ { label: "30d", value: 78 }, { label: "14d", value: 62 }, { label: "7d", value: 55 }, { label: "1d", value: 42 }, ], }, evidence: { hardware: [ "SMART warnings: reallocated sectors rising", "I/O latencies correlated with backup windows", ], software: ["Backup job overlapping causing higher I/O"], security: ["No persistent malicious indicators"], }, financial: { downtimeCostPerHour: 1200, repairEstimate: 1800, replaceEstimate: 4200, }, timeline: [ { ts: new Date(Date.now() - 48 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), actor: "tech.alex", action: "Requested replacement", note: "Intermittent failures observed" }, { ts: new Date(Date.now() - 36 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), actor: "ML Engine", action: "AI verdict", note: "Recommend APPROVE (94% confidence)" }, ], }, { id: "REQ-2026-002", systemId: "SYS-9031", owner: "Data Center / Rack 7", requestedBy: "ops.maya", aiVerdict: "reject", rootCause: "Software", confidence: 78, estimatedCost: 1600, riskIfDelayed: "Medium", status: "pending", timestamps: { requestedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 10 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), aiVerdictAt: new Date(Date.now() - 9 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), reviewedAt: null, finalDecisionAt: null, }, systemSnapshot: { ageYears: 2, warrantyUntil: null, healthTrend: [ { label: "30d", value: 88 }, { label: "7d", value: 84 }, { label: "1d", value: 80 }, ], }, evidence: { hardware: ["No hardware anomalies"], software: ["Misconfigured service causing retries", "Patch pending"], security: ["No issues"], }, financial: { downtimeCostPerHour: 400, repairEstimate: 400, replaceEstimate: 1600, }, timeline: [ { ts: new Date(Date.now() - 10 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), actor: "ops.maya", action: "Requested replacement", note: "App-level restarts observed" }, { ts: new Date(Date.now() - 9 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), actor: "ML Engine", action: "AI verdict", note: "Recommend REJECT (78% confidence)" }, ], }, { id: "REQ-2026-003", systemId: "SYS-7720", owner: "R&D / Lab", requestedBy: "eng.sam", aiVerdict: "approve", rootCause: "Hardware", confidence: 85, estimatedCost: 1200, riskIfDelayed: "Low", status: "approved", timestamps: { requestedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 6 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), aiVerdictAt: new Date(Date.now() - 5.5 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), reviewedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 4 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), finalDecisionAt: new Date(Date.now() - 3.5 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), }, systemSnapshot: { ageYears: 5, warrantyUntil: null, healthTrend: [ { label: "90d", value: 85 }, { label: "30d", value: 70 }, { label: "7d", value: 48 }, ], }, evidence: { hardware: ["Repeated ECC corrections on memory", "SMART critical thresholds exceeded"], software: ["N/A"], security: ["N/A"], }, financial: { downtimeCostPerHour: 200, repairEstimate: 200, replaceEstimate: 1200, }, timeline: [ { ts: new Date(Date.now() - 6 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), actor: "eng.sam", action: "Requested replacement", note: "Frequent crashes during tests" }, { ts: new Date(Date.now() - 5.5 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), actor: "ML Engine", action: "AI verdict", note: "Recommend APPROVE (85% confidence)" }, { ts: new Date(Date.now() - 4 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), actor: "lead.jordan", action: "Approved replacement", note: "Order placed" }, ], }, ]; // ---------- Utilities ---------- function currency(v) { return v.toLocaleString(undefined, { style: "currency", currency: "USD", maximumFractionDigits: 0 }); } function relativeTime(iso) { const d = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(iso).getTime()) / 1000); if (d < 60) return ${d}s ago; if (d < 3600) return ${Math.floor(d / 60)}m ago; if (d < 86400) return ${Math.floor(d / 3600)}h ago; return ${Math.floor(d / 86400)}d ago; } function statusBadgeClass(status) { switch (status) { case "pending": return "bg-yellow-50 text-yellow-800"; case "approved": return "bg-green-50 text-green-800"; case "rejected": return "bg-red-50 text-red-800"; case "deferred": return "bg-slate-50 text-slate-800"; default: return "bg-gray-100 text-gray-800"; } } function riskBadgeClass(risk) { if (risk === "High") return "bg-red-50 text-red-700"; if (risk === "Medium") return "bg-yellow-50 text-yellow-800"; return "bg-green-50 text-green-700"; } // ---------- Component ---------- export default function Decisions() { const [requests, setRequests] = useState(DUMMY_REQUESTS); const [query, setQuery] = useState(""); const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState("All"); const [rootCauseFilter, setRootCauseFilter] = useState("All"); const [sortKey, setSortKey] = useState("timestamps.requestedAt"); // default sort const [sortDir, setSortDir] = useState("desc"); // Drawer state const [drawerOpen, setDrawerOpen] = useState(false); const [selected, setSelected] = useState(null); // Action reason input within drawer const [actionMode, setActionMode] = useState(null); // 'approve' | 'reject' | 'defer' | 'evidence' const [actionReason, setActionReason] = useState(""); // Search + filters const visible = useMemo(() => { const q = query.trim().toLowerCase(); const filtered = requests.filter((r) => { if (statusFilter !== "All" && r.status !== statusFilter.toLowerCase()) return false; if (rootCauseFilter !== "All" && r.rootCause !== rootCauseFilter) return false; if (!q) return true; return ( r.id.toLowerCase().includes(q) || r.systemId.toLowerCase().includes(q) || r.owner.toLowerCase().includes(q) || r.requestedBy.toLowerCase().includes(q) ); }); // basic sorting const sorted = [...filtered].sort((a, b) => { const get = (obj, path) => path.split(".").reduce((s, k) => (s ? s[k] : undefined), obj); const va = get(a, sortKey); const vb = get(b, sortKey); if (va == null && vb == null) return 0; if (va == null) return sortDir === "asc" ? -1 : 1; if (vb == null) return sortDir === "asc" ? 1 : -1; if (typeof va === "number" && typeof vb === "number") return sortDir === "asc" ? va - vb : vb - va; return sortDir === "asc" ? String(va).localeCompare(String(vb)) : String(vb).localeCompare(String(va)); }); return sorted; }, [requests, query, statusFilter, rootCauseFilter, sortKey, sortDir]); // KPI badges const kpis = useMemo(() => { const pending = requests.filter((r) => r.status === "pending").length; const approvedToday = requests.filter((r) => { if (!r.timestamps.finalDecisionAt) return false; const d = new Date(r.timestamps.finalDecisionAt); const now = new Date(); return d.toDateString() === now.toDateString() && r.status === "approved"; }).length; const costAtRisk = requests .filter((r) => r.status === "pending") .reduce((s, r) => s + (r.estimatedCost || 0), 0); return { pending, approvedToday, costAtRisk }; }, [requests]); // Open drawer for item const openDrawer = (req) => { setSelected(req); setActionMode(null); setActionReason(""); setDrawerOpen(true); }; // Close drawer const closeDrawer = () => { setDrawerOpen(false); setSelected(null); setActionMode(null); setActionReason(""); }; // Perform action (placeholder - should call backend review API) const performAction = (mode) => { if (!selected) return; if (!actionReason || actionReason.trim().length < 5) { alert("Please provide a reason (min 5 characters) for this action."); return; } // Placeholder: update local state to simulate review action setRequests((prev) => prev.map((r) => r.id === selected.id ? { ...r, status: mode === "approve" ? "approved" : mode === "reject" ? "rejected" : mode === "defer" ? "deferred" : r.status, timestamps: { ...r.timestamps, reviewedAt: new Date().toISOString(), finalDecisionAt: mode === "approve" || mode === "reject" ? new Date().toISOString() : r.timestamps.finalDecisionAt, }, timeline: [ ...r.timeline, { ts: new Date().toISOString(), actor: "reviewer.current", action: mode === "approve" ? "Approved" : mode === "reject" ? "Rejected" : mode === "defer" ? "Deferred" : "Requested more evidence", note: actionReason }, ], } : r ) ); // Log to console as a placeholder for backend call console.log(Action performed: ${mode} on ${selected.id} with reason: , actionReason); // Close drawer after action closeDrawer(); }; // Sorting helper const toggleSort = (key) => { if (sortKey === key) { setSortDir((d) => (d === "asc" ? "desc" : "asc")); } else { setSortKey(key); setSortDir("desc"); } }; // Executive insights derived from dummy data (client-side) const insights = useMemo(() => { const moneySaved = requests.filter((r) => r.status === "rejected").reduce((s, r) => s + (r.estimatedCost || 0), 0); const falseClaims = requests.filter((r) => r.status === "rejected" && r.aiVerdict === "approve").length; const agingTrend = Math.round(requests.reduce((s, r) => s + (r.systemSnapshot?.ageYears || 0), 0) / requests.length); return { moneySaved, falseClaims, agingTrend }; }, [requests]); return (
